nits: base64 detection heuristic will reinterpret a short utf8 string whose charset/length matches base64 (e.g. 'test') — possible silent reinterpretation; consider an explicit encoding param.
live e2e used `aws s3 presign` CLI rather than exercising the tool's getSignedUrl code path; signing covered by mocked unit tests only.
latency_ms assertion is `>= 0`, trivially true with the mock `now` advancing by 5; tighter bound would catch regressions.
default S3Client is constructed lazily inside defaultDeps() on every invocation when no deps injected; module-scope caching would avoid the per-call overhead.
